name: @vkundapur/context-inspector
description_en: Pi coding agent extension: session context map and inspector. See a visual breakdown of context usage — prompts, tools, messages, token estimates — via the /context command.
description_zh: Pi 编程代理扩展：会话上下文映射和检查器。通过 /context 命令查看上下文使用的可视化分解 — 提示、工具、消息、令牌估算。
